decision: Simplified bets domain abstractions to concrete nil-safe behaviors for LSP scope
reason: Removed builder/factory/formatter indirection from the listed error and model definitions, made service options/defaults tolerate nil and typed-nil collaborators, and hardened listed test doubles to preserve predictable interface behavior.
impact: Improves substitutability of listed bets collaborators and keeps targeted tests deterministic under zero-value or reset-to-default cases.
